dp_living_cover_carrier_repair.ambient_affordance: tungsten lamp flicker, microscope glow, glass reflections, dust motes, subtle worker parallax
dp_living_cover_carrier_repair.mechanism_anchor: authority protects the flattering lie; active microscopy and chemical-analysis moment exposes the jaw/skull mismatch, filed teeth, and staining

next_action: human review of ambient-noticeability successor rough proof; choose keep, tighten, or reject

period_reference_repair.period_anchor: 1949-1953 analog Natural History Museum testing/evidence bench

period_reference_repair.story_anchor: evidence breaks the flattering missing-link story: separated cranium fragments, separate ape-like jaw with filed teeth, stained bone, gravel/strata sample

recognizability_ladder.evidence_object: separated partial cranium, separate ape-like jaw, visible filed teeth, stained bone fragments, and gravel or strata sample
recognizability_ladder.public_anchor: natural-history museum specimen room, evidence worktable, or display-case work surface
recognizability_ladder.system_clue: institutional storage drawers, specimen trays, microscope or testing lamp, X-ray/fluorine-test cue, and one anonymous back-turned museum worker

review_candidate_set.baseline_pointer_policy: Candidate G becomes the active review source-art pointer after DP carrier repair; no source-art keep is recorded until human review.
